recommendations.title: Replace aging or frequently-serviced devices
recommendations.evidence: 2 repeat service calls on same devices
recommendations.action: Identify devices with 3+ service calls, replace rather than repair, update inventory
recommendations.expectedBenefit: Reduce repeat service calls and improve reliability

recommendations.title: Perform battery load test and capacity verification
recommendations.evidence: Annual battery testing interval or battery age threshold approaching
recommendations.action: Conduct load test per manufacturer specs, verify standby/alarm capacity, replace if failed
recommendations.expectedBenefit: Ensure backup power reliability during AC failure

recommendations.title: Evaluate panel replacement or upgrade path
recommendations.evidence: Site has legacy panel type: Legacy Non-Standard Panel
